title: potentilla recta f. diminuta
intro: Potentilla recta f. diminuta, also known as Dwarf Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla recta f. diminuta include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
